home.title: Explore Apple stores.
home.subtitle: Find locations, track visits, and check the essentials.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search by store, city, country, status, feature...
home.empty: No stores match this search yet.
home.remoteError: Live data is unavailable, showing the local reviewed seed.

advancedFilters.title: Advanced filters
advancedFilters.subtitle: Combine countries, regions, years, styles, store features, and extras.

map.title: Worldwide map
map.copy: {{count}} stores loaded, {{visited}} marked visited on this device.

profile.title: Your visits.
profile.subtitle: Review visited stores, suggest a missing store, and adjust the app appearance.
profile.noVisits: No visits saved on this device yet.

privacy.noAds: No ads, no behavioral tracking SDKs, no resale of personal data.
privacy.localLocation: Location is used locally for nearby search unless a feature explicitly asks to save it.
privacy.optionalAccount: Visits stay on-device; contributions are sent as GitHub issues.
privacy.openData: Accepted factual contributions can enter the local dataset with review history.

profile.deleteWarningMessage: This action is irreversible. Your visits and local settings will be cleared from this device.
profile.deleted: All local data has been deleted.

store.visitInvalidDate: Use a date formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.
store.shareText: I visited {{name}} in {{place}} on {{date}}. Tracked with Atlas.
store.submitFailed: The submission failed. Please try again in a moment.
store.changeSubmitted: Thanks, the correction was sent for review.
store.changeRequired: Tell us what needs changing and the correct information to use.
store.suggestEditHelp: Describe the information to correct in plain language. You do not need to know the technical field name.
store.photoPermissionDenied: Allow photo access to choose an image.
store.photoSubmitted: Thanks, the photo was proposed. It will be reviewed before appearing in Atlas.
store.photoHelp: Add a photo you took. Your name or nickname can be shown with the photo if it is accepted.
store.fieldPathPlaceholder: E.g. address, hours, name, status, architecture...
store.photoCreditPlaceholder: E.g. first name, nickname, or group
store.caption: Caption

hours.official-link-only: Hours are not copied into Atlas because they change frequently.
hours.community-verified: Community-verified hours are available, with freshness metadata.

editor.requiredFields: Please fill all required fields: ID, name, city, country, and address.
